title: Guey
description: Updates the GUI to 2024, instead of feeling like a 2011 game.
body:
This UI resource pack changes the UI to feel more flat and modern. It changes bars to not have that ugly gradient, and the inventory grid is replaced by a solid background (trust me, better than it seems)


Also, I try to update as soon as a release comes out. This will be future-proofed in snapshots for upcoming UIs, like the crafter.
